span.p:
Phase 0: Teardown Old
00-teardown-old.yml
Remove previous cluster

div.style: color: rgb(238, 238, 238) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Phase 1: Host Bootstrap
01-host-bootstrap.yml
Create user, install packages

span.p:

02-generate-ssh-keys.yml
